title: Growth of DeFi and decentralization causes new phenomena
author: DreamilyAnnoying
selftext:
Hi guys!

How do you feel about the growth of the crypto industry in general, despite the fact that Bitcoin is going through hard times right now? Last year, I thought this rapid growth meant there would be many new projects that wouldn't even be very similar to those in the crypto industry before. For example, new directions and services are emerging, and I see this more and more often, especially when large companies from other industries are trying to integrate into crypto, which seems very remarkable to me.

Some time ago I started thinking that it would be cool to organize everything. I mean to make a platform specifically for the crypto industry, where there will be all applications associated with it, a convenient interface and service. Because for a couple of years, if not more, the App Store and Play Market have not been able to cope with this task, becoming objectively outdated platforms.

I was very happy when they told me about Magic Square. It is a blockchain-based platform from which absolutely everyone will benefit. Developers will get a convenient chance to develop applications for crypto and their adaptation, and we will get a convenient and clear system with an interface and the possibility to earn money by uploading and using apps
